metadata.label: Saved public benchmark starter pack
metadata.note: Generated from cached no-key public datasets where available; local defaults remain where a direct government metric is not yet wired.

inflationRate.bestOptionMetric: Use the recent BLS CPI-U average as a live inflation anchor, then stress test higher inflation separately.

vooReturn.bestOptionMetric: Use broad-equity return assumptions alongside the current Treasury risk-free anchor; higher equity returns require accepting volatility.
vooReturn.source: Equity planning proxy cross-checked against Treasury daily yield curve

primaryJobCompGrowth.bestOptionMetric: Latest BLS labor-market context shows unemployment near 3.8%. Keep wage growth conservative until role-specific BLS wage data is added.

retirementAge.bestOptionMetric: Model 67 as the standard baseline, then compare earlier and later retirement scenarios.

partnerStayHomeAge.bestOptionMetric: Use the same retirement-age baseline unless there is a known family-care or health reason.

setupPrimaryAge.bestOptionMetric: Start with the user's actual age; age drives every projection year and life-stage milestone.

setupPartnerAge.bestOptionMetric: Use the partner's actual age; mismatched ages affect income, retirement, and survivor horizons.

setupProjectionEndAge.bestOptionMetric: Use at least the SSA-informed conservative horizon for retirement planning, then extend for longevity stress testing.

numberOfChildren.bestOptionMetric: Enter the expected household count; this drives childcare, tax credits, and spending needs.

emergencyReserveMonths.bestOptionMetric: Use 6 months for a resilient baseline; 3 months is a minimum for stable dual-income households.

decisionLoanRate.bestOptionMetric: Compare against current Treasury and consumer-credit rates before using debt funding.

decisionDownPayment.bestOptionMetric: Use at least 20% when possible to reduce leverage and liquidity stress.

vacancyRate.bestOptionMetric: Use 5% to 8% for rentals unless local HUD or property-manager data says otherwise.

managementFee.bestOptionMetric: Use 8% to 10% for third-party property management in base rental cases.

lifestyleBaseline.bestOptionMetric: Use a local baseline first, then compare against the U.S. average for affordability pressure.
lifestyleBaseline.source: BLS Consumer Expenditure Survey planning proxy

lifestyleStyle.bestOptionMetric: Balanced household is the default option; move lean or premium only when the budget supports it.
lifestyleStyle.source: BLS Consumer Expenditure Survey planning proxy
